channel.title: Reading - Category - 滑翔闪'S BLOG
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Shanxi Datong "Engagement Rape Case" Second Trial: An Economic Perspective on Judicial Spirit and Execution
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: Analysis of Shanxi Datong “engagement rape case” second trial from an economic perspective, examining judicial spirit, procedural justice, and information asymmetry.

item.title: The Origin of Wealth: A Thousand Years of Darkness, One Lamp Illuminates All
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: “The Origin of Wealth” challenges the mainstream academic view of the Malthusian Trap while constructing a Darwinian perspective on economic history.

item.title: The Mathematical History of Economics
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: Reading notes on the book “Mathematics and Economics” by Shi Shuzhong, which introduces the development of mathematical tools in economics.

item.title: The Rhetoric of Economics
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: The Rhetoric of Economics discusses the literary aspects of economic works and even mathematical models from the perspective of literary criticism, offering a very unique viewpoint.

item.title: 《Crossing Boundaries of Community》: Fluid Relations and the Origins of Communities
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: Xiang Biao’s 《Crossing Boundaries of Community》 is straightforward and humorous, exploring his research methodology and focusing on new community development models.

item.title: Pursuing Scholarship: Beyond 'Serving the World' and 'Because the Mountain Is There'
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: This article explores the essence of academic pursuit through Wang Xiaobo’s works and the spirit of science, emphasizing that the drive for answers stems from curiosity and desire for knowledge, rather than pursuing utility or practicality.

item.title: Goodbye, Eri: Not Remembering Others, but Knowing Oneself
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: Behind every act of madness lies a resilient and pure heart. The key to understanding ‘Goodbye, Eri’ is not about remembering others but realizing Yuta was filming himself all along. Words fail to convey how much effort I’ve poured into loving this world.

item.title: The Selfish Gene: The Question of Altruistic Morality
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: GPT Summary: “The Selfish Gene” explores the relationship between natural selection and genes, revealing the mechanisms behind biological evolution. The author posits genes as the fundamental unit of natural selection, emphasizing that genes strive to enhance their survival probability in nature, while individual and group behaviors can be attributed to gene selection outcomes. Through logical deduction, the author refutes errors in other theoretical frameworks and elaborates on the gene selection theory. Simultaneously, the book provokes profound contemplation on natural selection and evolutionary theory, highlighting both similarities and differences between human societal operations and biological evolution.

item.title: HOW TO SLAY A DRAGON
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: GPT: In the realm of medieval fantasy, “How to Slay a Dragon” offers a whimsical journey through the Middle Ages, blending history with humor and adventure. While it may lack in-depth historical analysis, the book captivates readers with witty anecdotes and everyday insights into medieval life. Through its quirky storytelling and playful tone, it invites readers to explore the fascinating world of history through a fantastical lens.

item.title: The Calling of Spirits
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: GPT: The text delves into the historical event known as “The Calling of Spirits” during the Qing Dynasty in 1768. It discusses three main threads: public panic and dissemination of sorcery, political concerns and exploitation by the emperor, and bureaucratic dilemmas. The analysis covers folk beliefs, cultural contradictions between rulers and subjects, and the hierarchical nature of the bureaucratic system. The narrative draws parallels between historical occurrences and contemporary societal dynamics, particularly concerning power struggles and the manipulation of narratives. The comparison to cyberpunk themes adds a modern perspective to the analysis, highlighting the enduring relevance of historical events in understanding present-day society.
